requirement_topic.en: IPTO/HEDNO Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Network
requirement_topic.zh: IPTO/HEDNO并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz电网
requirement_topic.zht: IPTO/HEDNO併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz電網

summary.en: Greek electricity supply is operated through the transmission system operator IPTO/ADMIE and the distribution operator HEDNO/DEDDIE, with energy-sector oversight by RAAEY (Regulatory Authority for Waste, Energy & Water). The low-voltage context is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. That is the same frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Grid-connected charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring HEDNO supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, commissioning, and written project acceptance before energisation.
summary.zh: 希腊电力供应通过输电系统运营商IPTO/ADMIE及配电运营商HEDNO/DEDDIE运营，并由RAAEY（废物、能源与水监管局）进行能源监管。低压电网环境为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成HEDNO供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、调试及书面项目验收。
summary.zht: 希臘電力供應通過輸電系統運營商IPTO/ADMIE及配電運營商HEDNO/DEDDIE運營，並由RAAEY（廢物、能源與水監管局）進行能源監管。低壓電網環境為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成HEDNO供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能質量審查、調試及書面項目驗收。

HEDNO/DEDDIE distribution network connection and project acceptance (Greece)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Greece 230/400 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, and metering validation beyond the China baseline.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：希腊230/400 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计和计量。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：希臘230/400 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計和計量。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices, metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, and commissioning documents should be prepared for HEDNO review under RAAEY oversight. For non-interconnected island grids and resort or solar-linked sites, load management and demand limits should be agreed with HEDNO before shipment.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护器件、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护和调试文件应按RAAEY监管下的HEDNO审查准备。对于非互联岛屿电网、度假村或与太阳能相关的场址，应在出货前与HEDNO确认负载管理和需量限制。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護器件、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護和調試文件應按RAAEY監管下的HEDNO審查準備。對於非互聯島嶼電網、度假村或與太陽能相關的場址，應在出貨前與HEDNO確認負載管理和需量限制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected installations require IPTO/HEDNO project review and acceptance under RAAEY oversight; voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an IPTO/HEDNO approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Greece 230/400 V

source.publisher: Hellenic Electricity Distribution Network Operator (HEDNO / DEDDIE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Greece-ready EVSE needs IPTO/HEDNO project acceptance under RAAEY oversight and explicit 230/400 V 50 Hz validation. Do not describe the voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向希腊的EVSE需要RAAEY监管下的IPTO/HEDNO项目验收，并明确验证230/400 V 50 Hz。不得称其电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向希臘的EVSE需要RAAEY監管下的IPTO/HEDNO項目驗收，並明確驗證230/400 V 50 Hz。不得稱其電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。
